keeper: Affine freedom proposed many addresses. Only native G900 provenance may narrow them.
boundary: G900 provenance filter over slot-projection candidates only.
Scoring uses role frequency, source contexts, packet incidence, and observed anchor-limit support.
Selected G900 target edges are not inspected or used.
Frequency and co-visibility are evidence filters, not coupling laws.
A unique top score is a candidate, not automatic admission.
No target packet, G60 realization, channel, transport, native generator, theorem extension, geometry, GR, physics, force, body mutation, or Gap A closure claim.
